missables: Red Armlet — Destruction Sphere chest, Kilika Temple. Cannot return to Kilika Temple after leaving — this is permanently missable.

subLocations.name: Kilika Port
subLocations.prose: Help the NPCs after the Sin attack. The Ether is only available if you rescue the child from the crumbling hut. Rest at the inn to restore HP/MP.

subLocations.name: Kilika Woods
subLocations.prose: Linear path with side branches. Lord Ochu is an optional east-side fight — very tough at this stage (4,649 HP) but Luzzu gives an Elixir if you win. The Scout blitzball item is on a hidden side path west of the main road.

items.name: Elixir (from Luzzu after Lord Ochu — optional)

subLocations.name: Kilika Temple
subLocations.prose: Complete the Cloister of Trials. Before leaving, activate the Destruction Sphere to open the hidden chest containing the Red Armlet. You cannot return once you exit — this is permanently missable.

bosses.strategy: Optional fight in Kilika Woods. Very difficult at this stage — 4,649 HP, can inflict Sleep. Fire spells from Lulu are effective. Reward: Elixir from Luzzu. Skip if underleveled.

Phase 1 (shell form, 3,000 HP): Only magic penetrates the shell body. Kill both tentacles first (450 HP each) — they heal Geneaux every turn. Lulu's Fury with Thunder is ideal. Phase 2 (exposed): Physical attacks work. Yuna heals, Wakka and Tidus attack. Stay above 300 HP to survive Venom.
